name: Greater Restoration
desc: You imbue a creature you touch with positive energy to undo a debilitating effect. You can reduce the target's exhaustion level by one, or end one of the following effects on the target: - One effect that charmed or petrified the target - One curse, including the target's attunement to a cursed magic item - Any reduction to one of the target's ability scores - One effect reducing the target's hit point maximum
